chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-843 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 01-07-2025 Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Advocate along with both petitioners. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, APG along with Inspector/I.O Mashooque Ali of P.S, Kumb. ***** Statements filed by SSP, Khairpur, I.O and respondents No.3&4 are taken on record and copies whereof are supplied to counsel for the petitioners. I.O is present and submits that he has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 who has reiterated her freewill marriage with petitioner No.2 and therefore he will file a report before the concerned Magistrate disposing of the case under C-class. The Magistrate is directed to pass an appropriate order on such report within 15-days and dispose of the case, as recommended. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application(s) is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
